description_long: This is a cylindrical beer can with a predominantly red exterior and a bold, graphic label wrapping around its upper half. The label features a cream-colored background with a red and black geometric design, including a large, stylized script in black and red. The top of the can is a dark gray or black color, with a slightly raised rim, typical of modern beverage cans. The sides and back of the can are solid red, with the label only covering the front and part of the sides. The can appears to be made of metal, likely aluminum, and is sealed at the top, indicating it is unopened.
description: A red cylindrical beer can with a bold, graphic label and a dark top, featuring stylized black and red lettering on a cream background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with large, stylized black and red script on a cream background and the word 'BEER' at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view with the edge of the label visible, showing the transition from the graphic design to the solid red body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red surface of the can with no visible label or graphics.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing part of the label's edge and the solid red body, with the top of the can visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold, cartoonish design with a cream background, red geometric accents, and large, stylized black and red lettering. The overall style is playful and eye-catching, with simple color blocking and thick outlines.
